fomod.Name: OSF Animation
fomod.Author: ozooma10
fomod.Description: The engine of the OSF scene framework for Starfield (a SAF/NAFSF-lineage replacement): native GLTF/GLB animation playback, synced multi-actor scenes, shared-clock frame-locking, anchoring, a scene-graph runtime (nodes, cues, actions, callbacks), and a SAF compatibility shim. Content-neutral — the engine provides the mechanisms; specific adult content lives in the separate OSF Seduce content mod.
